title: Retries, Idempotency, Compensation, and Recovery · State Clinic: Idempotency Keys
summary: Harden a loop that calls unreliable external services. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops idempotency keys increment in a fault-injected recovery harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design idempotent operations and deduplication for repeated requests.
Use bounded retries with backoff and error classification.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
